name: Cuatro Highball
title: Cuatro Highball Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Cuatro Highball | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A refreshing highball with Bacardí Añejo Cuatro, ginger ale, and optional Angostura bitters, served over ice with lime.
marketing_description: As day becomes night, savour the refreshing Caribbean flavours of Añejo Cuatro rum and ginger ale. It's called the Cuatro Highball, or as we like to say, paradise in a glass.

steps: Add a squeeze of lime and garnish with a lime slice.
Add a dash of bitters if desired.
Garnish with a squeeze of lime and a lime wheel.

raw_text_excerpt: How to make a Cuatro Highball 50 ml BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum 100 ml ginger ale 1 dash Angostura® bitters (optional) 2 lime wedges Step 1 Ice Build long over cubed ice. Step 2 Build Garnish with a squeeze of lime and a lime slice. Step 3 Dash Add a dash of bitters if desired. Step 4 Garnish Garnish with a squeeze of lime and a lime wheel.

source_metadata.description: Learn how to make this signature Cuatro Highball Cocktail. Check out our BACARDÍ receipe and ingredient list here and start mixing!
